recommendations.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure with TCFD Reporting
recommendations.description: Publish a comprehensive TCFD report including Scope 3 financed emissions to match or exceed SBI's disclosure, improving ESG ratings and attracting ESG-mandated FII inflows.
recommendations.profitability_link: Attracting ₹3000 Cr in ESG inflows could yield a 5-10% valuation premium, potentially increasing market cap by ₹150-300 Cr
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India published TCFD report and improved CDP rating, attracting ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows

recommendations.title: Strengthen SEBI Quarterly Corporate Governance Reporting
recommendations.description: Ensure timely and enhanced SEBI quarterly corporate governance reports to avoid regulatory scrutiny and potential trading restrictions.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding 20-40 bps cost of capital increase can save ₹50-100 Cr annually in financing costs

recommendations.title: Leverage ESG Leadership in Investor Communications
recommendations.description: Develop targeted investor communication campaigns highlighting top S&P Global CSA ranking to secure ESG index inclusion and increase capital inflows.
recommendations.profitability_link: ESG index inclusion can lead to a 5-10% valuation premium, potentially adding ₹100-200 Cr in market value
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Peers have leveraged ESG rankings for capital inflows; YES BANK can capitalize on first-mover advantage

recommendations.title: Integrate ESG Metrics into Talent Acquisition Strategy
recommendations.description: Use ESG leadership and Edelman Trust Barometer insights to enhance employer branding, improving talent retention and reducing hiring costs.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved retention can reduce hiring costs by 10%, saving ₹10-15 Cr annually
